title: Sholto
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Sholto''' was an individual who owned the travel company [[Sholto's Shuttles!]].

==Behind the scenes==
Although it is never said explicitly that Sholto is an individual, it can be assumed that this individual is from the name of the company Sholto's Shuttles!.

==Sources==
*<!-- 2004-05-05 -->{{FactFile|123|PUR 1-2|Starship Purchase}}
